whyMessaging.title: Why Messaging Platforms Matter More Than Ever
whyMessaging.intro: Messaging platforms hawwe become one fan the most important tools foar communication yn today’s world. From personal conversations nei business interactions, messaging apps tastean people nei stay connected instantly en efficiently.
whyMessaging.everydayDesc: People rely op messaging apps foar daily communication mei friends, famylje, en colleagues. Whether it's a quick update of a long conversation, messaging provides a convenient en flexible way nei stay yn touch.
whyMessaging.speedDesc: One fan the main advantages fan messaging platforms is their speed. Berjochten binne delivered instantly, allowing gebrûkrs nei communicate yn real time. Dit level fan convenience hat made messaging the preferred method fan communication foar many people.
whyMessaging.globalDesc: Messaging platforms connect people across the globe. With internet access, gebrûkrs kin communicate regardminder fan location, making it easier nei build relationships en collaborate internationally.
whyMessaging.privacyDesc: Modern messaging platforms focus op giving gebrûkrs control over their data en conversations. Funksjes like fersifering, privacyynstellingen, en berjocht controls tastean gebrûkrs nei communicate mei confidence.
whyMessaging.futureDesc: Messaging continues nei evolve mei nij funksjes such as AI-oandreaune responses, oersetting, en multimedia sharing. As technology advances, messaging platforms sil become even mear powerful en versatile.
whyMessaging.outro: Chatforia is built mei dizze principles yn mind, offering a fluch, feilich, en gebrûkr-friendly messaging experience foar a connected world.

global.title: The Future fan Wrâldwiid Communication
global.intro: Communication hat evolved rapidly over the past few decades. What once fereaske telefoan oproppen of in-person meetings kin no wêze done quickly through messaging platforms. As technology continues nei advance, wrâldwide kommunikaasje is becoming flucher, mear accessible, en mear inclusive.
global.barriersDesc: One fan the biggest changes yn communication is the reduction fan geographic barriers. People kin no connect mei others across the world yn near real time. Whether foar personal conversations, business, of collaboration, messaging platforms hawwe made distance far minder limiting.
global.translationDesc: Taal hat traditionally west one fan the biggest obstacles nei wrâldwide kommunikaasje. Hjoed, built-in oersetting tools help bridge dat gap. Platforms like Chatforia tastean gebrûkrs nei communicate mear easily even as sy speak different languages, creating nij opportunities foar connection en understanding.
global.realtimeDesc: Speed is a kaai factor shaping modern communication. Brûkrs expect berjochten nei wêze delivered quickly, en modern infrastructure supports dat expectation. Real-time messaging enables mear natural en fluid conversations.
global.privacyDesc: As communication becomes mear digital, privacy en feiligens binne increasingly important. Brûkrs want confidence dat their conversations binne protected. Funksjes like fersifering en gebrûkr-controlled ynstellingen help stipe a mear feilich communication experience.
global.futureDesc: The future fan wrâldwide kommunikaasje sil likely include mear avansearre tools, such as AI-assisted messaging, improved oersetting, en enhanced gebrûkr experiences. As technology evolves, communication sil continue nei become mear intuitive en accessible.
global.outro: Platforms like Chatforia binne part fan dit shift, helping people connect mear easily across languages en borders.

why.title: Why people switch nei Chatforia
why.subtitle: Chatforia gives do a real telefoannûmer, smart oersetting, en a clear path nei go ad-free wannear you’re ready.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Lighter advertinsjes op Fergees, a simple Plus opwurdearje wannear you’re ready, en Premium tools TextNow doesn’t offer.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: Modern app, global-first design, en built-in oersetting instead fan old-school oprop trochstjoere.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs petear apps
messengers.body: Text real telefoannûmers — net just other app gebrûkrs — mei AI en status built in. Great as you’re coming fan apps like TextFree of TextMe.

why.disclaimer: Comparison based op publicly beskikber information en mei feroarje over time. Other free-texting apps like TextFree of TextMe binne generally similar nei TextNow.

free.a: Yes. The Fergees plan omfettet a Chatforia-nûmer, calling, en messaging mei ads. Do kin stay op Fergees as long as do like, of opwurdearje nei fuortsmite advertinsjes en unlock mear features.

plusPremium.q: What’s the difference between Plus en Premium?
plusPremium.a: Plus removes advertinsjes en extends dyn berjochtskiednis — perfect foar everyday gebrûk. Premium adds extra customization, AI tools foar rewrites en replies, en priority stipe foar swier gebrûkrs.

esim.a: Chatforia Mobile gebrûks wrâldwiid eSIM coverage. Availability depends op dyn lân en device. You’ll see supported options during activation binnen the app.

cancel.q: Kin ik op elk momint annulearje of fan plan feroarje?
cancel.a: Yes. Do kin beheare of annulearje dyn abonnemint fan the fakturearring page yn the app. Changes take effect at the end fan dyn hjoeddeistich fakturearring period.

family.a: Famylje packs create a dielde datapool across multiple Chatforia accounts. One person pays the bill, en do kin útnoegje of fuortsmite leden en set limits per person.

account.q: Hoe meitsje ik myn account oan of herstel ik it?
account.a: Download the app of gebrûk web, tap “Account oanmeitsje”, verify dyn e-mail/phone. To recover, gebrûk “Wachtwurd fergetten”.

privacy.a: Yes. Berjochten en oproppen binne ein-oan-ein fersifere troch default. Only do en the recipient kin read them.

translate.a: Ynskeakelje “Automatysk oersette” yn Ynstellings → Uterlik en taal. Wy oersette on-device wêr supported, otherwise through feilige API’s mei minimale metadata.

contact.a: Reach us at support@chatforia.com. Include screenshots en dyn app version.

intro.body: Dit Privacybelied explains hoe Chatforia (“wy”, “us”) collects, gebrûks, en shares information wannear do gebrûk our apps en services. Wy design Chatforia nei minimize the data wy kin access.

infoWeCollect.title: Information wy collect
infoWeCollect.account: Account info (e.g., e-mail/phone) nei create en feilich dyn account.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Fersifere content (berjochten/calls) is ein-oan-ein fersifere; wy can’t read it.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Diagnostic/usage like crash logs, apparaat typ, of coarse analytics nei improve performance.

sms.title: Mobile telefoannûmers en SMS
sms.body: If do kieze nei provide a mobile telefoannûmer, wy gebrûk it nei ynskeakelje funksjes such as account verification, oanmelde alerts, en gebrûkr-to-gebrûkr messaging via SMS wêr supported. Wy mei ferstjoere transactional SMS berjochten related nei dyn account en activity op Chatforia. Do kin opt out fan receiving SMS berjochten at any time troch replying mei a supported opt-out keyword (such as “STOP”) of troch changing dyn notifikaasje preferences yn the app. Wy doch net sell dyn telefoannûmer of gebrûk it foar unrelated marketing.
sms.enterRecipient: Fier yn a namme of nûmer
sms.addRecipient: Tafoegje a recipient hjirboppe nei begjin…

howWeUse.title: How wy gebrûk information
howWeUse.provide: Provide en feilich the service (auth, spam/abuse detection).

sharing.title: Sharing
sharing.body: Wy net sell personal data. Wy mei share limited data mei processors (e.g., push notifikaasjes, analytics) under strict contracts.

rights.title: Dyn rights
rights.body: Depending op dyn region (e.g., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), do mei request access, correction, deletion, of opt-out fan certain processing. Kontakt: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Data retention & feiligens
retention.body: Wy retain only what’s needed nei operate the service en apply indusbesykje-standard security. E2E content can’t wêze decrypted troch us.

children.title: Children
children.body: Chatforia isn’t directed nei children under 13 (of as fereaske troch dyn lokaal law).

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: We’ll post updates here en revise the “Lêst bywurke” date.

intro.body: By brûken Chatforia do agree nei dizze Terms. If do doch net agree, net gebrûk the service.

accounts.itemResponsibility: You’re responsible foar activity op dyn account.

acceptableUse.title: Akseptabel gebrûk
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: Gjin illegal, abusive, of infringing content; gjin spam of automated abgebrûk.

sms.title: SMS-kommunikaasje
sms.body: If do provide a mobile telefoannûmer, do agree dat Chatforia mei ferstjoere do SMS berjochten related nei dyn account en gebrûk fan the service, such as oanmelde alerts, feiligens notifikaasjes, en berjochten related nei conversations do initiate of participate in. Wy doch net gebrûk SMS foar promotional of marketing berjochten sûnder dyn explicit consent. Standard berjocht en data rates mei apply. Do kin opt out fan SMS berjochten at any time troch replying mei a supported opt-out keyword (foar example, “STOP”) of troch updating dyn notifikaasje ynstellingen yn the app.

yourContent.title: Dyn content
yourContent.body: Do retain rights nei dyn content. Do grant us necessary rights nei operate the service (e.g., routing, storage, oersetting).

disclaimer.title: Disclaimers & liability
disclaimer.body: Service is provided “as is” sûnder warranties. To the fullest extent permitted troch law, Chatforia isn’t liable foar indirect of consequential damages.

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: Wy mei update dizze terms; continued gebrûk after changes means acceptance.

doNotSell.title: Do Not Sell of Share My Personal Information
doNotSell.body: Chatforia docht net sell personal information. California residents kin still submit requests under CPRA brûken the button hjirûnder.

cookies.title: Cookie Ynstellings
cookies.body: Chatforia gebrûks minimal cookies (e.g., session, feiligens). Wy net gebrûk third-party advertinsjes cookies. Beheare cookies via dyn browser’s settings.

greetings.long2: Hi {{name}} 😊 What would do like nei talk about hjoed?

account.q: Hoe meitsje ik myn account oan of herstel ik it?
account.a: Download the app of gebrûk web, tap “Account oanmeitsje”, verify dyn e-mail/phone. To recover, gebrûk “Wachtwurd fergetten”.

privacy.a: Yes. Berjochten en oproppen binne ein-oan-ein fersifere troch default. Only do en the recipient kin read them.

translate.a: Ynskeakelje “Automatysk oersette” yn Ynstellings → Uterlik en taal. Wy oersette on-device wêr supported, otherwise through feilige API’s mei minimale metadata.

contact.a: Reach us at support@chatforia.com. Include screenshots en dyn app version.

press.title: Press
press.contactLine: For media inquiries, reach us at
press.boilerplateBody: Chatforia is a privacy-earst messaging app dat makes cross-language petear effortminder. Berjochten binne ein-oan-ein fersifere troch standert, en built-in oersetting supports 100+ languages yn real time. Brûkrs kin ynskeakelje ferdwynende berjochten, keep lêsbefêstigingen opsjoneel, en sync across devices. Beskikber op iOS, Android, en the web.
press.scanTip: On desktop? Scan mei dyn telefoan nei get the app.

careers.title: Careers
careers.intro: We’re a small founding team building Chatforia — a privee, wrâldwiid messenger launching op web, iOS, en Android. If do care about privacy, fersifering, en delightful gebrûkr experiences, we’d love nei hear fan you.
careers.openRoles: Iepenje founding roles: Lead Full-stack Engineer, Backend Engineer (Node.js), Frontend/Web Engineer (React), Mobile Engineer (iOS), Mobile Engineer (Android), DevOps/SRE, Feiligens & Fersifering Engineer, Telecom Engineer (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: How nei apply: Brûk the button hjirûnder nei e-mail dyn resume en links.
careers.whyBullets:
• Help build the foundation fan a nij wrâldwiid messenger.
• Ship improvements gebrûkd across web, iOS, en Android.
• Work directly mei the founder op architecture en product direction.
• Own high-impact areas fan the stack: messaging, voice, fideo, fersifering, telecom, AI.
• Join at the beginning — before the gebrûkr base scales.

about.title: About Chatforia
about.description: Chatforia is a feilich, multilingual messenger mei ein-oan-ein fersifering, direkt oersetting, en voice/video calling. Our mission is simple: help people connect—safely, privately, en across languages.

values.access_aria: Access foar alle: Automatysk oersette 100+ languages.
values.control_aria: Control: Ferdwynende berjochten en lêsbefêstigingen binne optional.

about.howDescription: Berjochten binne fersifere op dyn apparaat before sy leave it. Oersetting, backups, en apparaat sync binne designed nei minimize wat our servers kin see.

advertise.title: Advertise mei Chatforia
advertise.description: Reach engaged messaging gebrûkrs mei tasteful, brand-safe placements. Wy offer banner inventory yn high-visibility spots, sponsorships, en hogebrûk promos. Premium subscribers doch net see ads.

adsense.withPubIdShort: Wy also serve inventory via Google AdSense. Do kin target Chatforia mei publisher ID {{pubId}}, of gebrûk the form hjirûnder foar direct sponsorships.
adsense.noPubIdShort: Wy also serve some inventory via Google AdSense. Direct sponsorships binne beskikber—gebrûk the form hjirûnder.

advertise.noPlacementsPublic: We’re finalizing our advertinsje inventory. Tell us about dyn campaign en we’ll recommend placements.

why.deals: Direct deals of programmatic via AdSense/Google Advertinsjes
